scripts.build: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter ./client exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter ./server exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter client test && pnpm --filter server test
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules client/dist server/dist client/node_modules server/node_modules
scripts.lint: echo 'No linter configured. Run F1-T1 to set up ESLint.'
scripts.format: echo 'No formatter configured. Run F1-T1 to set up Prettier.'
